summary: Professional digital banking platform website with AI Chatbot (DSOUZA AI) and Voice Assistant integrated in the header. Features a light, premium, modern design with high-contrast dark text, clean layout, and full responsiveness.
architectural_notes: Header contains: Size selector, Language (EN), AI Chatbot (DSOUZA AI), and Voice Assistant icons
Design uses light premium background with high-contrast dark text (WCAG compliant)
Platform is a professional digital banking site requiring elegance, minimalism, and full responsiveness

existing_features.title: Remove the Accessibility (A11y) icon/button from the header's icon row — the one positioned between the Language (EN) switcher and the AI Chatbot (DSOUZA AI) icon. After removal, adjust spacing and alignment of the remaining header controls (Size, EN, DSOUZA AI, Voice) so the layout is clean, symmetrical, and professionally aligned on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
Make all header text labels — Size, EN, DSOUZA AI, and Voice — darker and highly readable. Apply a dark color of #000000 or #1A1A1A so they stand out clearly against the light header background.

Apply high-contrast dark text colors across the entire website. Use #000000 for primary text and #1A1A1A or #222222 for secondary text. This applies to all headings (h1–h6), subheadings, navigation menu items, body text, button labels, card text, form labels, and footer text. Update global CSS custom properties and/or Tailwind config to enforce these values site-wide. Maintain the light, premium background; only darken foreground text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove Accessibility (A11y) icon from header and adjust spacing for clean, symmetrical layout
Make all header text labels (Size, EN, DSOUZA AI, Voice) darker and highly readable
Make all website text darker using high-contrast colors (#000000, #1A1A1A, #222222) across headings, body, buttons, and footer
